metadata.description: Base44 Marketing Content Creation System - Orchestrated brand content with specialized agents

plugins.name: base44-marketing
plugins.description: Marketing content orchestrator with brand-aware sub-agents, 77+ tactics, 71 psychology principles, and brand governance. Features open-ended routing, GTM strategist, anti-TV-ad tone enforcement, channel-specific content (LinkedIn, X, Email, SEO), hook creation rules, cross-platform repurposing, and automated landing page generation.
